CREATE TABLE BPEL_PROCESS (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), content VARCHAR(10000));
INSERT INTO BPEL_PROCESS (id, name, content) VALUES (1, 'Echo', 'file:/echo/bpel.xml');
CREATE TABLE WSDL_FILES (id INT PRIMARY KEY, url VARCHAR(255), process_id INT REFERENCES BPEL_PROCESS(id));
INSERT INTO WSDL_FILES (id, url, process_id) VALUES (1, 'file:/echo/wsdl.xml', 1);
CREATE PROCEDURE import_bpel () { DECLARE scp INT; BPEL.BPEL.import_script('file:/echo/bpel.xml', 'Echo', scp); };
CREATE PROCEDURE fetch_bpel_with_wsdl () { DECLARE scp INT; BPEL.BPEL.import_script((SELECT url FROM WSDL_FILES WHERE process_id = 1), 'Echo', scp); };
CREATE PROCEDURE import_multiple_wsdl () { DECLARE scp INT; BPEL.BPEL.import_script('file:/echo/bpel.xml', 'Echo', scp); BPEL.BPEL.import_script('file:/echo/wsdl1.xml', 'Echo', scp); };
CREATE PROCEDURE edge_case_bpel_import () { DECLARE scp INT; BPEL.BPEL.import_script('', 'Echo', scp); };
CREATE PROCEDURE invalid_path_bpel_import () { DECLARE scp INT; BPEL.BPEL.import_script('file:/invalid/path/bpel.xml', 'InvalidProcess', scp); };
